title: [supervisor] Implement PR-repair queue projection and state transitions
objective: Build: Replace the one-off dated queue row with a v1 `.handoff/pr-repair/queue.jsonl` projection/tooling that records discovered, classified, lane_created, assigned, repairing, awaiting_ci, green, merged, blocked, and superseded transitions without duplicating canonical live state.
acceptance_criteria: A committed `.handoff/pr-repair/queue.jsonl` or documented generated projection exists with the v1 fields from `.handoff/.idea/pr-repair-state-decision.md`.
Queue updates are append-only or replace-by-key through a tool/script; casual hand-editing is not the required workflow.
State transitions identify their canonical writer: supervisor, worker, verifier, or GitHub evidence.
Existing dated queue artifact is either migrated, indexed, or explicitly retained as historical input.
Binary ledger caches remain gitignored; any ledger/events export is text and policy-compliant.
